summary: Prepare a monthly forecast package with assumptions, budget variance, and cash posture for finance-owner review.

inputs.name: actuals_snapshot
inputs.description: Latest monthly actuals with source references.

inputs.name: forecast_horizon
inputs.description: Period to project, such as quarter or rolling twelve months.

inputs.name: planning_assumptions
inputs.description: Revenue, spend, hiring, and scenario assumptions.

outputs.name: forecast_summary
outputs.description: Base, upside, and downside forecast with assumption notes.

outputs.name: budget_variance_notes
outputs.description: Major variance drivers versus plan or prior forecast.

outputs.name: cash_posture_handoff
outputs.description: Liquidity view and explicit finance-review handoff.

budget.notes: High-stakes workflow. Preserve source labeling and reviewer handoff.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is forecast support and not tax, investment, or filing advice.
Require actuals, horizon, and assumptions before any forecast narrative is generated.
Mark all projections as decision support and attach a finance-review disclaimer before external sharing.
End with a named human finance owner or reviewer handoff; do not claim approval.

steps.action: Separate actuals from assumptions, confirm horizon, and define forecast scenarios.
Explain major budget variances and note where plan assumptions changed.
Assess liquidity timing, cash pressure points, and dependency on collections or spend changes.
Merge the scenario summary, variance notes, and cash posture into a reviewer-ready monthly package.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read source actuals, prior forecasts, and planning notes.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Write the finance review pack when requested.

verification.method: Check actuals, assumptions, and projections are clearly separated.
Check material budget variances include drivers and not just numbers.
Check the output includes disclaimer language and named reviewer handoff.

success_criteria: The package labels actuals, forecast assumptions, and scenario ranges without ambiguity.
The forecast includes variance commentary and cash implications, not just projected totals.
The final output explicitly states it is not financial advice and requires human finance review before operational use.

rollback.when: If projections are unsupported or mixed with actuals, revert to the normalized input set and regenerate the variance and cash steps.
